text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Wow, you made it look super easy! ♪ Thanks a
lot, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe, I just know my Umadol skills will soar with
this Cutie in my room! And then...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
The two of us will walk the road to top Umadol
together!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
That means I'm counting on you from now on!
Let's kick things off with a duet! ☆
